impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.intro: Information obligation according to section 5 E-Commerce-Gesetz (ECG) and section 25 Mediengesetz (MedienG).
impressum.name: [Your Full Name]
impressum.euDisputeText: In accordance with Regulation (EU) No 524/2013, the European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.euDisputeNote: We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.disclaimerText: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
impressum.vatNote: In accordance with section 6 (1) Z 27 UStG, no sales tax is charged (Kleinunternehmerregelung).

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.introText: The protection of your personal data is important to us. This privacy policy explains which data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
datenschutz.controllerText: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
datenschutz.dataCollectedIntro: We collect the following personal data:
datenschutz.dataAccount: Account data: Email address and encrypted password (hashed with argon2id) when you register.
datenschutz.dataLearning: Learning data: Topics, flashcards, reviews, and study statistics you create during use.
datenschutz.dataTechnical: Technical data: Server logs containing IP address, timestamp, and request details for security and debugging purposes.
datenschutz.legalBasisContract: Processing of account and learning data is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract) — it is necessary to provide the service you signed up for.
datenschutz.legalBasisLegitimate: Processing of technical data (server logs) is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest) — specifically, the security and stability of the service.
datenschutz.storageText: Your data is stored on a self-hosted server located in Austria. Data is not transferred to third countries.
datenschutz.retentionText: Your personal data is stored as long as your account exists. Server logs are retained for a maximum of 30 days. When you delete your account, all your data (profile, topics, cards, reviews, images) is permanently and irreversibly deleted.
datenschutz.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
datenschutz.rightAccess: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You can request information about the personal data we store about you.
datenschutz.rightRectification: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You can request correction of inaccurate data.
datenschutz.rightErasure: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You can request deletion of your data. You can delete your account at any time through the application.
datenschutz.rightPortability: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You can request an export of your data in a machine-readable format.
datenschutz.rightComplaint: Right to lodge a complaint: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (Datenschutzbehorde, dsb.gv.at).
datenschutz.cookiesText: We do not use cookies. We use browser localStorage to store your authentication token (JWT) and language preference. This data never leaves your browser and is not used for tracking.
datenschutz.thirdPartyText: LearnForge processes all data locally on its own infrastructure. Text embeddings for semantic search are computed on-device. We currently do not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.
datenschutz.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The current version is always available on this page with the date of last update.

agb.title: Terms of Service
agb.scopeText: These terms of service ("Terms") govern your use of the LearnForge platform ("Service"), operated by [Your Full Name] ("Operator"). By creating an account, you agree to these Terms.
agb.serviceText: LearnForge is an AI-powered spaced repetition flashcard platform. It provides tools for creating, organizing, and reviewing flashcards using scientifically optimized scheduling algorithms and AI-assisted content generation.
agb.accountText1: You must provide a valid email address to register. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure.
agb.accountText2: You must not share your account with others or use the service for illegal purposes.
agb.accountText3: You must not upload content that is illegal, harmful, or infringes on third-party rights.
agb.ipUserContent: You retain full ownership of all content you create (flashcards, topics, notes). We claim no intellectual property rights over your content.
agb.ipPlatform: The LearnForge platform is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). The source code is publicly available.
agb.betaText: The service is currently in early access. Features may change, and we cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability. We will do our best to preserve your data, but recommend keeping backups of important content.
agb.liabilityText: The service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The operator is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Liability is limited to cases of intent and gross negligence under Austrian law.
agb.terminationText: You may delete your account at any time. The operator reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. Upon termination, all your data will be permanently deleted.
agb.lawText: These Terms are governed by Austrian law. The courts of Austria shall have exclusive jurisdiction for any disputes arising from these Terms.
agb.changesText: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
